steps.title: Find the shared topic
steps.content: Text 1 discusses what scientists can learn from sloth fossils and why living sloths are hard to observe. Text 2 describes backpack monitors that help scientists study tree-dwelling sloths.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported topics
steps.content: B introduces climate change, which neither text discusses. C shifts to caring for sloths, not studying them. D fits part of Text 1 but not Text 2, which focuses on living sloths and monitoring technology. Both texts concern scientific study. The answer is A.
